title: MCP-A discover Response
description: Response for the discover primitive (SPEC §1). MUST include the `server` capability block and an RBAC-filtered `domains` catalog.

server.description: Server capability block. MUST be present in every discover response (SPEC §1). Clients SHOULD use this to determine capabilities rather than probing individual primitives.

conformance_level.description: Declared conformance level (SPEC §Conformance Levels). MUST accurately reflect what the server implements.

supported_primitives.description: Exactly which primitives this server exposes. If a primitive is absent, clients MUST NOT call it.

domains.description: RBAC-filtered catalog of information domains available to the user. Domains the user cannot access MUST NOT appear.

total_count.description: Total number of domains available to the user (may exceed the returned page size).
